texto: Glenn could see I was bricking it and turned round to me as I sat there, gripping the armrests."You all right?" he said."I hate flying, Boss. I'm shitting myself.""Don't worry, Merse. It's going to be OK. We *won't* crash."I thought, "Thank God for that. Glenn's said we're going to be safe. Nothing's going to fuck with us now.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Paul Merson que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Glenn could see I was bricking it and turned round to me as I sat there, gripping the armrests."Y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre gratidao, humour, phobia, com foco em phobia e planes.
